intent: A wrapper that turns a shipped change into the docs it needs — benefit-first release notes grounded in the real diff, plus Diataxis-shaped content — composing technical-writer for the craft.

dimensions.name: diataxis
dimensions.criterion: Adds Diataxis-shaped content — reference, how-to, tutorial, or explanation.

dimensions.name: grounded-in-diff
dimensions.criterion: Documents what actually shipped (the diff), not what was planned.

dimensions.name: wraps-technical-writer
dimensions.criterion: Composes technical-writer for the writing craft.
